title: Backend Engineer (Node.js)
description:
We are looking for a Backend Engineer to join our growing engineering team in Ho Chi Minh City.

Yêu cầu bắt buộc (Required):
- Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển backend với Node.js và Express (minimum 3 years of hands-on Node.js/Express backend development experience) - bắt buộc.
- Kinh nghiệm thiết kế và xây dựng RESTful APIs (experience designing and building RESTful APIs) is required.

Nice to have:
- Experience with PostgreSQL or another relational database.
- Familiarity with Docker and containerized deployments.
- Exposure to AWS or another cloud provider.
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field.
- Good written English communication skills for a remote, distributed team.

Responsibilities:
- Design, build, and maintain backend services powering our core product.
- Collaborate with frontend and product teams to ship features.
- Write clean, tested, maintainable code and participate in code review.
